name: chat-bot-bridge
description: Provider-neutral Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp bridge for the trading desk

scripts.schedule:install: ! grep -q YOUR_NAME com.example.desk-premarket.plist && ! grep -q YOUR_NAME com.example.desk-postmarket.plist && cp com.example.desk-premarket.plist com.example.desk-postmarket.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ && launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.desk-premarket.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.desk-postmarket.plist && echo 'example weekday schedules loaded; confirm the times match your timezone and workflow'
scripts.schedule:uninstall: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.desk-premarket.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.desk-postmarket.plist; rm -f ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.desk-premarket.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.desk-postmarket.plist && echo 'scheduled runs removed'
scripts.tunnel:install: cp com.example.chat-bot-tunnel.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ && launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.chat-bot-tunnel.plist && echo 'tunnel service loaded (webhook mode only)'
